items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a superior submission game compared to Benoit Saint-Denis.
Benoit Saint-Denis possesses better wrestling ability than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: Patty might not have the wrestling that Ben does.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has demonstrated high durability by going five rounds with Justin Gaethje without being finished.
items.quote: Patty just went five rounds with Justin Gatei. Didn't get finished.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not been focused on MMA training over the last five years due to business ventures and lifestyle factors.
items.quote: In the last 5 years, he hasn't truly been focused on MMA.

items.claim: Max Holloway has maintained a high level of activity against top-tier competition over the last five years.
items.quote: he's been fighting winning and losing, but he's active.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's physical condition has been negatively impacted by his lifestyle and lack of consistent training over the last five years.
items.quote: You can't undo everything that you've done in that time.
